name: SetBusContext
title: SetBusContext
description: Sets the bus context of the CAPL block.

parameters.name: context
parameters.description: The new bus context to be set.

return: The bus context that was valid before the call was made is returned.

description: This is an example for a simulation node. Test nodes should copy the bus context to a CAPL variable in the Main() function because all global variables are cleared when the test module is started.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
